channel.title: GeoPulse. Geopolitics in brief
channel.description: Signal-first briefings on geopolitics, edited by Lavkesh Dwivedi.

item.title: Trump Extends Cease-Fire Before Deadline Expires; Vance’s Trip on Hold
item.description: Trump extended a cease-fire before the deadline expired, putting Vance's trip on hold. Iran Live Updates: Trump Extends Cease-Fire Before Deadline Expires; Vance’s Trip on Hold The New York Times.

item.title: After first quarterly dip in nearly seven years, where are HDB resale prices headed?
item.description: HDB resale prices dipped for the first time in nearly seven years, indicating a more balanced market. The latest dip in HDB resale prices suggests that the market is headed towards a more balanced state, says market observer Lee Nai Jia.

item.title: As China exports more robots and AI, what could it mean for the world’s workforce?
item.description: China exports more robots and AI, potentially changing the world's workforce. As China ramps up exports of robots and AI, global buyers are turning to automation to tackle risky and repetitive jobs, raising questions about how work will change.

item.title: From big US orders to many small buyers: What China’s largest trade fair says about its new export
item.description: China's Canton Fair shows exporters adapting to smaller orders and diverse buyers. At the Canton Fair held twice yearly in Guangzhou, exporters are adapting to smaller orders and a wider mix of buyers as shifting demand reshapes global trade - testing whether new markets can match the scale once provided by the West.

item.title: If you’re unhappy at work, a hasty job change may not help
item.description: SMU lecturer Nick Chiam says finding joy at work is part of a larger life story. Finding joy at work isn’t about having the perfect job, but seeing work as part of the larger story of a life well lived, says SMU lecturer Nick Chiam.

item.title: Apple CEO Tim Cook resigns after 15 years. What’s next for the tech giant?
item.description: Tim Cook resigned as Apple CEO after 15 years, with John Ternus taking over. Rather than a dramatic shift, the leadership transition from Tim Cook to John Ternus is likely going to be more subtle, says an academic.

item.title: Iran Threatens To End Gulf Nations' Oil Production As Truce Deadline Nears
item.description: Iran's Revolutionary Guards threatened to end Gulf nations' oil production. The threat was made as a truce deadline nears. Iran's Revolutionary Guards on Tuesday threatened to end oil production in the Middle East if the Islamic republic faced attacks launched from its Gulf neighbours' territory.

item.title: What To Know As Trump Extends Ceasefire In Iran War
item.description: Trump extended the Iran ceasefire indefinitely. Trump announced that the ceasefire would be extended indefinitely. What To Know As Trump Extends Ceasefire In Iran War.

item.title: Trump suggests he won’t end ceasefire with Iran even if talks are productive
item.description: Trump said he will not end the Iran ceasefire even if talks are productive. Iran war live updates: Trump suggests he won’t end ceasefire with Iran even if talks are productive MS NOW.

item.title: Trump Announces Iran Ceasefire Extension Until Negotiations Conclude
item.description: The US-Iran ceasefire is set to expire, casting doubt on ongoing talks. The ceasefire was established after the US-Iran war broke out on February 28, but its terms are now under review.

item.title: Trump extends ceasefire as uncertainty over U.S.-Iran peace talks remains
item.description: Trump extended the Iran ceasefire as US-Iran peace talks remain uncertain. Live Updates: Trump extends ceasefire as uncertainty over U. S.-Iran peace talks remains CBS News.

item.title: Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire Indefinitely With Peace Talks in Limbo
item.description: Trump extended the Iran ceasefire indefinitely amid uncertain peace talks. Iran War Live News Updates: Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire Indefinitely With Peace Talks in Limbo WSJ.

item.title: Trump extends Iran ceasefire, blockade amid uncertainty over peace negotiations
item.description: US President Trump extended the Iran ceasefire and blockade, maintaining economic sanctions amid uncertain peace negotiations. The move keeps pressure on Iran while leaving diplomatic channels open. Trump extends Iran ceasefire, blockade amid uncertainty over peace negotiations Politico.

item.title: Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire, Hormuz Blockade To Continue
item.description: Trump extended the Iran ceasefire until a proposal is submitted. The Hormuz blockade will continue. Trump says extending ceasefire until Iranian proposal is submitted and discussions are concluded. Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire, Hormuz Blockade To Continue.

item.title: Pro-Palestine legal aid requests stay high in 2025 amid US campus pressure
item.description: Pro-Palestine legal aid requests remained high in 2025, indicating sustained advocacy efforts. The rate of requests suggests that activism persists despite challenges from the US administration. Legal aid group says the rate of requests shows pro-Palestine advocacy persists despite Trump administration's tactics.

item.title: Nearly 8,000 people died or disappeared on migration routes in 2025: IOM
item.description: Nearly 8,000 people died or disappeared on migration routes in 2025, according to the IOM. Over 40% of these incidents occurred on sea routes to Europe, the UN agency reported.

item.title: US issues more Iran sanctions on eve of possible talks in Pakistan
item.description: The US issued sanctions on 14 Iranian individuals and entities. The Trump administration targets 14 individuals and entities over alleged links to Iran's arms industry. US issues more Iran sanctions on eve of possible talks in Pakistan.

item.title: Trump extends ceasefire until Iran submits proposal
item.description: Trump extended the ceasefire with Iran until a proposal is submitted. The move came after an Iranian commander threatened to destroy the region's oil industry. An Iranian commander had threatened to destroy the region's oil industry if war resumed with the U. S.

item.title: Trump extends ceasefire until Iranian proposal is submitted, talks are over
item.description: Trump extended the ceasefire until Iran submits a unified proposal. Pakistan requested the move to allow Iranian leaders to come up with a proposal. The U. S. President ⁠said he was acting at the request of ​Pakistan to ‌hold off attacks until Iranian leaders and representatives could come ‌up with what ​he called a unified proposal.

item.title: Fired U.K. Official Describes ‘Pressure’ to Expedite Envoy’s Appointment
item.description: A fired UK official described pressure to expedite Peter Mandelson's appointment as ambassador to Washington. Mandelson is a Jeffrey Epstein associate. Prime Minister Keir Starmer’s office wanted Peter Mandelson, a Jeffrey Epstein associate, swiftly installed as ambassador to Washington, the official said.
